hero.heading: AI Answers Questions. <1>Is It Quoting You?</1>
hero.subtitle: People ask ChatGPT and Perplexity every day. We make sure AI picks your website.

education.label: Education
education.title: What is Answer Engine Optimization?
education.description: AI search engines pick websites to quote. AEO helps them pick yours. It's the new way to show up when AI gives answers.
education.descriptionBold: AI search engines pick websites to quote.
education.descriptionRest: AEO helps them pick yours. It's the new way to show up when AI gives answers.

phases.sectionSubtitle: 7 phases that take you from invisible to cited. Each phase builds on the last — here’s what to expect.
phases.footer: The 99-point checklist guides you through every task in every phase.
phases.footerSuffix: guides you through every task in every phase.

0.title: Foundation & Audit
0.description: Audit existing content and technical infrastructure. Map questions, analyze competitors, and establish your AEO baseline.
0.visibility: Know where you stand — baseline metrics and content gaps identified

1.title: Structured Data & Schema
1.description: Implement FAQ, HowTo, Article, Product, and Organization schema markup to make your content machine-readable.
1.visibility: AI engines can now read and understand your content structure

2.title: Content Optimization
2.description: Restructure content with answer paragraphs, heading hierarchy, comparison tables, and topic clusters.
2.visibility: Your content becomes the best possible answer for AI queries

3.title: Technical AEO
3.description: Configure AI bot access, semantic HTML, RSS feeds, internal linking, and meta optimization.
3.visibility: AI crawlers can access and extract your content efficiently

4.title: Authority & Trust
4.description: Build E-E-A-T signals, authority backlinks, Google Business Profile, and citation networks.
4.visibility: AI engines trust your content as a credible, authoritative source

5.title: Testing & Validation
5.description: Test across ChatGPT, Perplexity, Google AI, and Bing Copilot. Validate schema and crawlability.
5.visibility: Verify you appear across all major AI platforms

6.title: Monitor & Iterate
6.description: Track AI citations, A/B test answer formats, benchmark competitors, and re-optimize monthly.
6.visibility: Continuous improvement — stay visible as AI engines evolve weekly

features.sectionTitle: Built for AEO from the Ground Up
features.sectionSubtitle: Find what's broken. Fix it. Track the results. One tool.

0.title: 99-Point AEO Checklist
0.description: Phase-by-phase tasks covering every aspect of AEO — from schema markup to content structure to AI crawler access.

1.title: Real-Time Site Analyzer
1.description: Enter any URL for an instant 100-point AEO readiness score — no API key needed. Checks schema, AI crawler access, content structure, and more.

2.title: Multi-Engine Testing Lab
2.description: Test how your content appears across ChatGPT, Perplexity, Claude, and Gemini simultaneously.

3.title: AI Content Writer
3.description: Generate AEO-optimized content with structured data and direct answer formatting built in.

4.title: Schema Generator
4.description: Point-and-click markup builder for FAQ, HowTo, Article, and more — no coding required.

5.title: Monitoring & Alerts
5.description: Track AI citation changes over time and get alerts when your visibility shifts.

0.question: What is Answer Engine Optimization (AEO)?
0.answer: AEO helps your website get quoted by AI tools. ChatGPT, Perplexity, and Gemini read the web for answers. AEO makes sure they find and cite your site.

1.question: How is AEO different from traditional SEO?
1.answer: SEO helps you rank on Google. AEO helps AI tools quote you. Both matter, but AEO targets how AI picks its sources.

2.question: Who is AEO Dashboard built for?
2.answer: Agencies, SEO pros, and marketers. Whether you run one site or a hundred, the tool scales with you.

3.question: When will AEO Dashboard launch?
3.answer: We're in the final build phase. Join the list to hear first. A small group gets early access before launch.

4.question: What features does AEO Dashboard include?
4.answer: A 99-point checklist. A site scanner. A test lab for AI tools. A content writer, markup builder, and alerts when things change.

5.question: Do I need technical knowledge to use AEO Dashboard?
5.answer: No. The tool walks you through each step. No coding needed. Each task tells you what to do and why.

6.question: How does the 99-Point AEO Checklist work?
6.answer: It breaks AEO into 7 steps. Each step has clear tasks with guides. You check them off, and the tool tracks your score.

7.question: What AI engines does AEO Dashboard support?
7.answer: ChatGPT, Google AI, Gemini, Perplexity, Bing Copilot, and Claude. The test lab checks all of them at once.

8.question: Is AEO Dashboard free?
8.answer: Early users get full access at no cost. After launch, there will be free and paid plans. Join the list to lock in your spot.

9.question: Can I use AEO Dashboard for multiple websites?
9.answer: Yes. You can add many sites to one account. Each site gets its own checklist, scores, and alerts.

aiCost.description: Complete all 99 checklist items using every AI feature — Content Writer, Analyzer, Schema Generator, and more — for approximately $2–3 in total API costs.

1.label: Full project completion

2.label: Ongoing monthly cost

scorecard.closeConfirm: Your progress will be saved. Close?

q1.text: Does your website have FAQ sections with clear Q&A formatting?

q2.text: How often do you publish or update content on your website?

q3.text: Does your content directly answer questions people ask AI assistants?

options.0: Yes, we write for this specifically
options.1: Some of our content does naturally

q4.text: Does your website use structured data (schema markup)?

q5.text: Are AI crawlers (GPTBot, PerplexityBot, etc.) allowed in your robots.txt?

q6.text: Does your website have an XML sitemap with accurate lastmod dates?

options.1: Yes, but not sure about lastmod

q7.text: Have you tested how your brand appears in AI search engines (ChatGPT, Perplexity, Gemini)?

q8.text: Do you know if your content appears in Google AI Overviews?

q9.text: Do you track how much traffic comes from AI-powered sources?

options.0: Yes, we have this set up

q10.text: Do you know if your competitors are being cited by AI engines?

q11.text: Does your organization have a dedicated AEO strategy (beyond traditional SEO)?

options.0: Yes, it's part of our roadmap

websiteCount.text: How many websites do you manage?

results.title: Your AEO Readiness Score
results.ctaTitle: AEO Dashboard fixes all of this — automatically.

whatHappensNext.title: What Happens Next
whatHappensNext.step2: We send you a custom action plan within 24 hours
whatHappensNext.step3: Top scorers get early access invites

invisible.label: AI Invisible
invisible.desc: AI tools can't find your site right now. That means zero quotes and zero traffic from AI. But the fix is clear. Let us show you how.

starting.label: Getting Started
starting.desc: You have some basics in place. But big gaps remain. Close them fast and you could see AI traffic in weeks.

onTrack.label: On Track
onTrack.desc: Nice work! Your site is on the right track. A few small fixes in your weak spots could push you to the top tier.

aiReady.label: AI Ready
aiReady.desc: You're ahead of 95% of sites. AI tools can find and quote your content. Keep it up and stay on top.

add_faq_sections.title: Add FAQ sections to key pages
add_faq_sections.desc: AI tools love Q&A content. Add FAQs and you'll get quoted faster than any other fix.

increase_publish_frequency.title: Post new content more often
increase_publish_frequency.desc: Fresh content tells AI your site is active. Aim to post weekly if you can.

write_direct_answers.title: Write clear answers to common questions
write_direct_answers.desc: AI picks short, clear answers. Write like you're talking to a friend who asked for help.

add_schema_markup.title: Add schema markup to your site
add_schema_markup.desc: This is the #1 tech signal AI uses to read your site. Without it, AI can't parse your pages well.

check_ai_crawlers.title: Unblock AI bots in robots.txt
check_ai_crawlers.desc: If AI bots are blocked, your site will never show up in AI answers. Check this today.

add_sitemap_lastmod.title: Add a sitemap with fresh dates
add_sitemap_lastmod.desc: A sitemap tells AI which pages you have. The dates tell it what's new. Both matter.

test_ai_citations.title: Test your site in AI search tools
test_ai_citations.desc: Ask ChatGPT and Perplexity about your brand. See what comes up. You can't fix what you don't see.

track_ai_overviews.title: Track Google AI Overviews
track_ai_overviews.desc: Google now shows AI answers above search results. Check if your pages show up there.

setup_ai_traffic_tracking.title: Set up AI traffic tracking
setup_ai_traffic_tracking.desc: Most tools don't split out AI traffic. Set this up so you know how much AI sends your way.

monitor_competitors_ai.title: Check what AI says about your rivals
monitor_competitors_ai.desc: If AI quotes your rival but not you, find out why. Then close the gap.

create_aeo_strategy.title: Build a plan just for AEO
create_aeo_strategy.desc: AEO needs its own plan. SEO tactics alone won't cut it. Map out what to fix and when.

successState.title: ✓ Your AEO Score: {{score}}/{{max}} — {{tier}}
successState.subtitle: We'll reach out with your personalized action plan.
successState.sharePrompt: Share your score with your team:
successState.timeline: We'll review your score and send a custom plan within 24 hours. Top scorers get early access.
